questions.question: The period called …………… marks the beginning of agriculture and animal domestication.
Direct ancestor of modern man was
…………… refers to the area covering Egypt, Israel-Palestine and Iraq.
Sir Robert Bruce Foote, a geologist from England first discovered the …………… tools at Pallavaram near Chennai.
(i) The Neolithic people used polished stone axes called Celts.
options: (ii) Evidence of Neolithic village is found at Payyampalli in Chennai district.
(iii) The cultural period that succeeded the Neolithic is called the Bronze Age.
(iv) The period that witnessed domestication of animals and cultivation of crops is called Mesolithic.

questions.question: Assertion (A): The Ashokan inscriptions datable to third century BCE refer to the Cheras, Cholas, Pandyas and Satyaputras outside his empire in Tamilagam.
options: Reason (R): Ancient kings of Tamilagam commenced their political rule in the Iron Age.
A and R are correct and R explains A
A and R are correct but R doesn’t explain A
A is correct but R is incorrect
questions.explanation: Book-back answer: A and R are correct but R doesn’t explain A
